name: The Ashen Witness
benefits: Offers three unique headers exclusive to its members (players are not required to purchase these headers to join the faction or engage in its storyline).
requirements: New recruits haven't been truly accepted until they earn a nickname: informal, irreverent, often ironic.
Fully initiated members burn all their former possessions - except for a single item - in a symbolic reenactment of the burning of the sacred library.
That single item becomes their Token and must be carried at all times and protected with their lives.
When a member falls, their Token is retrieved and carried for them by another, for it is their legacy and how they are remembered.
A player may only be part of one faction.
flavor: A once-noble band of ash-sworn mercenaries and outcasts, risen from the survivors who burned their own city's sacred library, now feared for their ruthlessness, loyalty to their own, and guardianship of secrets.

name: The Grey Cloaks
benefits: Offers three unique headers exclusive to its members (players are not required to purchase these headers to join the faction or engage in its storyline).
requirements: A player may only be part of one faction.
flavor: Wandering guardians of the wilds and highlands who ride ahead of the primal magic Storms to warn villages and cull the twisted beasts and growths left in their wake.

name: The Gilded Hart
benefits: Offers three unique headers exclusive to its members (players are not required to purchase these headers to join the faction or engage in its storyline).
requirements: Uphold the Code of the Gilded Hart: "Be the flame where darkness lingers, the light where hope is lost."
Uphold the Code of the Gilded Hart: "Take no coin for cruelty, no rest while the wronged cry out."
Uphold the Code of the Gilded Hart: "Shield the meek, challenge the ruthless, speak truth unbroken."
A player may only be part of one faction.
flavor: Free-riding chivalric knights and healers who cast aside their noble titles to defend the common folk and safeguard the customs, rites, and bonds that hold civilization together.

name: The Veilward Enclave
benefits: Offers three unique headers exclusive to its members (players are not required to purchase these headers to join the faction or engage in its storyline).
requirements: A player may only be part of one faction.
flavor: A secretive order of part-mercenary, part-arcane-scholar sentinels, forever altered by hidden rituals and eldritch lore, who guard the light against the dark and hold back the encroaching void.
